title: abrus melanospermus subsp. suffruticosus
intro: Abrus melanospermus subsp. suffruticosus, also known as the small-leaf jumbay or small-leaf rosemalta, is a perennial herb species within the Fabaceae family, native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Abrus melanospermus subsp. suffruticosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
